/usr/bin/c++ -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -O3 -g -fPIC -march=native  -O3 -g -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -fPIC -D __FILENAME__='"$$(subst  /Users/igor/Documents/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/,,$$(abspath $$<))"' -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -o libGrafo.dylib -install_name @rpath/libGrafo.dylib CMakeFiles/Grafo.dir/src/Grafo.cpp.o
